name: Glade Flappy Init
description: Initialize flappy state once at start
code: (function(){var w=dimensionContext.width,h=dimensionContext.height; return Object.assign({}, state, { flappy:{x:w*0.25,y:h*0.5,vy:0,alive:true,score:0,t:0}, pipes:[], keys:{space:false,jump:false,help:false}, showHelp:false }); })();
